prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年物理类最低位次约 5988→7577→9436→8486→12636，整体呈持续后移趋势，近 3 年累计后移约 3200 名；2025 年基准约 12636 名，较 2024 年大幅后移约 4150 名，竞争明显加剧；本省物理类计划 2021–2023 年均为 31 人，2024 年降至 28 人，2025 年回升至 32 人；2026 年计划 33 人，较 2025 年小幅扩招 1 人（+3.1%），扩招幅度较小，对竞争缓解作用有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜约第 56 名（2026 年），近年排名稳定在 46–56 名区间，属全国政法类院校最高水平；2024 年声誉偏负面（内蒙古理科法学类投档线暴跌），2026 年声誉偏负面（早年校园安全事件被重提）；抖音热度总排名第 6（高热），短视频曝光量高，反映报考关注度持续升温；法学 A+（全国唯一法学 A+ 学科），与该校招生专业高度匹配，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度 2021–2023 年持续偏热（推荐），2024 年转为分化观望，但仍是文科/政法类头部选择；本省物理类考生 2021–2025 年从 14.7 万增至 25.0 万，2026 年估算约 25.3 万（按历史占比推算），考生规模持续扩大，竞争压力上升；省控线 2025 年物理类本科批 426 分，较 2024 年 437 分略降，但位次后移幅度远超省控线波动；中国政法大学位于北京，非湖北省内高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在湖北招生占比约 0.5%–1%，跨省报考需考虑地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合物理类位次持续后移趋势、2026 年计划小幅扩招（+1 人）及本省物理类考生持续增加，在 2025 年基准 12636 名基础上预计竞争继续加剧；预测最低位次约 12903 名，区间 12403–13403 名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（法学人才培养模式改革实验班）
- 法学（金融双学士学位项目）
- 法学。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 信息管理与信息系统（北理联合培养数据法学实验班）
- 纪检监察（卓越法纪人才培养实验班）
- 经济学
- 国际商务（涉外法商人才培养实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工商管理（创新与知产管理方向）
- 社会工作。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间内（12403–13403 名）建议以二档为主、一档冲刺、三档保底；位次明显优于区间上限可重点冲一档法学王牌专业；位次接近区间下限则优先保二档法学专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5988→7577→9436→8486→12636, showing a continuous backward trend overall, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3200 places in the last 3 years; the baseline in 2025 is about 12636, a significant backward shift of about 4150 places compared to 2024, indicating intensified competition; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 31 students from 2021 to 2023, dropped to 28 in 2024, and rebounded to 32 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 33 students, a slight expansion of 1 student (+3.1%) compared to 2025, which has limited effect on alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 56th (2026), stable in the 46–56 range in recent years, the highest level among national political and legal institutions; reputation in 2024 was somewhat negative (sharp drop in admission scores for law category in Inner Mongolia science), reputation in 2026 is somewhat negative (early campus safety incidents resurfaced); Douyin heat total ranking 6th (high heat), high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; Law A+ (the only A+ discipline in law nationwide), highly matched with the university's admission majors, strongly attractive to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity was continuously hot (recommended) from 2021 to 2023, turned to divided observation in 2024, but remains a top choice in liberal arts/political and legal fields; provincial Physics Category candidates increased from 147,000 in 2021 to 250,000 in 2025, estimated at about 253,000 in 2026 (based on historical proportion), with continuous expansion of candidate scale and rising competitive pressure; provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 426 points, slightly lower than 437 points in 2024, but the ranking shift far exceeds the fluctuation of the control line; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a Hubei provincial university, with no local admission preference; its enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 0.5%–1%, cross-province application requires consideration of regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of Physics Category rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+1 student), and the continuous increase in provincial Physics Category candidates, competition is expected to intensify further based on the 2025 baseline of 12636; predicted minimum ranking approximately 12903, range 12403–13403.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Law (Law Talent Cultivation Model Reform Experimental Class)
- Law (Finance Dual Bachelor's Degree Program)
- Law.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Information Management and Information Systems (BIT Joint Cultivation Data Law Experimental Class)
- Discipline Inspection and Supervision (Outstanding Legal Discipline Talent Cultivation Experimental Class)
- Economics
- International Business (Foreign-Related Legal Business Talent Cultivation Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Business Administration (Innovation and Intellectual Property Management Direction)
- Social Work.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If ranking is within the predicted range (12403–13403), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, sprint for Tier 1, and use Tier 3 as safety; if ranking is significantly better than the upper limit of the range, focus on sprinting for Tier 1 law flagship majors; if ranking is close to the lower limit of the range, prioritize securing Tier 2 law majors.

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学专业热度 2021–2023 年持续偏热（推荐），2024 年转为分化观望，但仍是文科头部选择；本省历史类考生 2021–2025 年从 14.9 万降至 14.1 万，2026 年估算约 14.1 万（按历史占比推算），考生规模基本持平；省控线 2025 年历史类本科批 442 分，较 2024 年 432 分上升，整体竞争略加剧；中国政法大学位于北京，非湖北省内高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在湖北招生占比约 0.5%–1%，跨省报考需考虑地域偏好。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历史类位次震荡波动、2026 年计划微幅缩招（-1 人）及抖音高热关注度，在 2025 年基准 1346 名基础上预计竞争略有缓解；预测最低位次约 1316 名，区间 1079–1553 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1053→1409→863→1533→1346, with significant fluctuations and an overall oscillating trend; the 2025 baseline is about 1346, moving forward by about 187 places compared to 2024's 1533; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 36 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 43 in 2024, and significantly increased to 53 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 52 students, a slight reduction of 1 student (-1.9%) compared to 2025, a very minor reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 56th (2026), with recent rankings stable in the 46–56 range, the highest level among national political and legal institutions; 2024 reputation was slightly negative (sharp drop in Inner Mongolia science law admission line), 2026 reputation is slightly negative (early campus safety incidents revisited); Douyin popularity total ranking 6th (high heat), short video exposure high, reflecting continuously rising application attention; Law A+ (the only law A+ discipline nationwide), highly matching the school's admission majors, extremely attractive to top liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law major popularity was continuously high from 2021 to 2023 (recommended), turned to divergent observation in 2024, but remains a top choice for liberal arts students; provincial History Category candidates decreased from 149,000 in 2021 to 141,000 in 2025, estimated at about 141,000 in 2026 (based on historical proportion), candidate scale basically flat; provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 was 442 points, up from 432 points in 2024, overall competition slightly intensified; China University of Political Science and Law is located in Beijing, not a Hubei provincial university, with no local enrollment preference; the school's enrollment proportion in Hubei is about 0.5%–1%, cross-province application requires consideration of regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating historical rankings of the History Category, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (-1 student), and high Douyin attention, competition is expected to ease slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 1346; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1316, with a range of 1079–1553.
